brief.title: Here
brief.logline: A quiet montage of places most of us will never stand in — and the one we already do — carried by a single voice.
brief.artistic_style: Warm-neutral color of honest light, slow steady drone/steadicam moves. No VFX, no transitions. Restrained documentary photography.

script.summary: A quiet montage of places most of us will never stand in — and the one we already do — carried by a single voice.

shots.description: Domestic interior, morning - A girl stands in a sunlit kitchen, the first human presence anchoring the montage.

prompt.primary: A young girl in a quiet kitchen at morning, soft window light, restrained documentary framing.

routing.reasoning: Human subject — routed to Kling via fal.ai per humans_never_veo rule.

attempts.judge_notes: Natural performance, light handles skin tones honestly, no VFX intrusion.

shots.description: Enniskerry, Ireland (interior cottage, dawn) - Wide, still frame of a quiet hallway in soft morning light. Dust motes.

prompt.primary: Wide, still frame of a quiet hallway in soft morning light. Dust motes.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Stillness reads as intent, not absence. Dust-mote particulate is plausible at f/2.8-equivalent depth; floorboard tonal range holds without crushed shadows. Camera doesn't drift — the held frame earns the open.

shots.description: Great Barrier Reef, Australia (underwater) - Slow drifting camera through the reef, mid-water, late afternoon sun shafting down from above.

prompt.primary: Slow drifting camera through the reef, mid-water, late afternoon sun shafting down from above.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Caustics break across the substrate without strobing — Wan handles rolling sun shafts cleanly. Coral parallax convincing on the foreground sweep. Minor gripe: a school of fish near 0:04 reads slightly synthetic at the tail; not flagging for revision because midground attention dominates.

shots.description: Okavango Delta, Botswana (golden hour) - Aerial wide shot, drifting low over the flood at golden hour: elephants wading.

prompt.primary: Aerial wide shot, drifting low over the flood at golden hour: elephants wading.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Golden-hour rake is honest — no orange-teal grade pushed in post. Elephants register weight in the wading splash; the lead bull's gait is anatomically right at this aerial scale. Drift speed maps to a real heli pass, not a drone with too much yaw freedom.

shots.description: Amazon canopy, Peru (aerial) - Wingtip-height pass across the Amazon canopy from 40 metres up. A macaw crosses frame left-to-right.

prompt.primary: Wingtip-height pass across the Amazon canopy from 40 metres up. A macaw crosses frame left-to-right.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Wingtip-height parallax is the test and Veo passes it — emergent canopy layer separates cleanly from the understory at speed. Mist sits right; doesn't hover artificially. This is the shot that justifies the Veo spend on the budget — couldn't have hit it on Wan.

shots.description: Hokkaido, Japan (winter, night) - A held wide shot of a frozen lake under aurora, steam rising from a thermal vent. A single red fox crosses the ice.

prompt.primary: A held wide shot of a frozen lake under aurora, steam rising from a thermal vent. A single red fox crosses the ice.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Frozen-night palette holds — the blue cast doesn't blow out into Christmas-card teal. Snowfall density is sparse on purpose and the model respected that. Approved despite a soft edge on the upper-left tree mass; the held wide forgives it. Retry would have cost free quota for negligible gain.

shots.description: Vatnajökull Glacier, Iceland (dusk) - A slow, sweeping panoramic drone shot over a massive blue glacier. Deep crevasses and ancient ice stretching to the horizon.

prompt.primary: A slow, sweeping panoramic drone shot over a massive blue glacier. Deep crevasses and ancient ice stretching to the horizon.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Glacier-blue penetrates the ice convincingly — subsurface scatter, not painted-on cyan. Sweeping pan is steady; horizon line doesn't wobble where Kling sometimes drifts. Dusk falloff against the ice is the soft sell, and it works.

shots.description: Closing image — wide exterior, Ireland - A clean, wide exterior shot of the cottage at dawn, smoke lifting from the chimney.

prompt.primary: A clean, wide exterior shot of the cottage at dawn, smoke lifting from the chimney.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Closing exterior carries the rhyme back to sh_001 without copying it — same tonal register, different framing. The film breathes out here. No motion at all and that's the right call; a slow push-in would have undercut the brief.

dialogue.text: There are places on this planet you will never stand in.
A canopy you cannot reach except by wing.
And a frozen expanse of ancient ice, shifting under its own weight.
